title: Tech selloff weighs on risk sentiment
section_path: Tech selloff weighs on risk sentiment
section_path_text: Tech selloff weighs on risk sentiment
summary:
Main
A risk-off tone across markets weighed on commodity markets. Precious and industrial metals led the sell-off. Oil was also lower on lower geopolitical tensions.

children.title: Main
children.summary: A risk-off tone across markets weighed on commodity markets. Precious and industrial metals led the sell-off.

children.title: Market Commentary
children.summary: Crude oil fell amid a risk off tone across markets. Easing geopolitical tensions also weighed on the market.

children.title: Chart of the Day
children.summary: Global storage of crude oil on tankers at sea is sitting at record highs. However, the easing of some sanctions on Venezuela has seen this level drop in recent weeks.
